issueClusters.title: Implement supply/withdraw/borrow/repay in the Verity EDSL
Implement collateral and liquidation flows in the Verity EDSL

notes: Fail-closed semantic bridge obligation tracker. Each entry maps a SolidityBridge.lean hypothesis to its upstream verity discharge dependency. macroMigrated=true means the operation has a full (non-stub) implementation in MacroSlice.lean. Current verity pin is 7b7c9193; Links 2+3 are tracked via the typed-IR compilation-correctness framework. Old manual SpecCorrectness proofs removed.
